creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
This upgrades audio/waveplay from 19990123 to 20000321.

Found it while looking for Ports "Left Alone Too Long."  I've tried to
contact the Maintainer and have have CC'd them on this PR as well to
establish a timeline.

I would ask that if ysonoda@dontaku.csce.kyushu-u.ac.jp isn't heard from
that I take over this Port.

Please note that the following files and directory should be deleted:

files/patch-aa
files/patch-ab
files/patch-ac
files/

...As their changes have been included in the distfile.
